hero.eyebrow: MP3 — People's Movement for Prosperity and Progress
hero.headline: We cut anger, We change

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.community_desc: We believe in the strength of our communities. We work together to build a more just society.
mission.equity_desc: We fight for a system where everyone has equal opportunities to succeed.
mission.efficiency_desc: We are committed to managing the country's resources well with transparency.

history.title: History of MP3
history.subtitle: A vision for a better Haiti
history.foundation_desc: The People's Movement for Prosperity and Progress (MP3) was founded in 2024 by a group of citizens committed to changing Haiti's political system. The party was created to respond to the people's need for a different way of doing politics, based on values of transparency, accountability, and community development.
history.vision_desc: We envision a Haiti where all citizens have access to education, health, and economic opportunities. A country where the government is accountable to the people, where national resources are managed efficiently for the benefit of everyone.
history.community_desc: We believe in the strength of our communities. Each community has the potential to develop locally and contribute to national progress.
history.equity_desc: We are committed to reducing social and economic inequalities, and ensuring that all citizens have equal opportunities to succeed.
history.efficiency_desc: We promise to manage the country's resources well, eliminate waste, and guarantee that every gourde spent produces real results for the people.

candidates.subtitle: Our team — dedicated to changing Haiti

membership.title: Become an MP3 Member
membership.subtitle: Fill out this form to become an official party member
membership.condition_1: I declare that I am not a member of any other political party
membership.condition_2: I commit to defending the values and interests of MP3
membership.condition_3: I accept the party's statutes and internal regulations
membership.condition_4: I enjoy all my civil rights
membership.benefit_5: Represent the party in your area
